title: kalmia procumbens
intro: Kalmia procumbens, also known as Mountain Laurel, is a perennial flowering shrub native to eastern North America. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, as well as its ability to support cardiovascular health and immune function. The health benefits of Kalmia procumbens include reducing stress and anxiety, improving circulation, and acting as an antiviral agent. Herbal preparations of Kalmia procumbens can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support overall well-being and promote relaxation.
